unreal.comment: Official UE 5.8 Unreal MCP plugin (experimental). Editor must be running with the 'ModelContextProtocol' plugin enabled AND the server started via the console command 'ModelContextProtocol.StartServer' (it does NOT auto-start). Editor-control tools require the 'EditorToolset' + 'AutomationTestToolset' plugins (enabled in MCPPlayground.uproject). Regenerate with: ModelContextProtocol.GenerateClientConfig ClaudeCode (note: the generator appends a redundant 'unreal-mcp' entry pointing at the same URL — prune it).
